item.title: New release of Iosevka—a font for coders—now has variable width and expanded width variants
item.description:
• Separated private build plans from built-in build plans.
    • Add new variants for $.
    • Initial refinements on APL symbols.
  • 2.0.0
    • Added weight semibold and extrabold. Adjusted weight for bold.
    • The building system is redesinged and now it no longer depends on MAKEFILE.
    • The font menu name for SS## and Term SS## are changed to be able to co-exist with normal Iosevka. (That is why I changed the major version number.)

Prebuilt Packages

Iosevka provides a large variety of variants. Prebuilt variants are described below.

  • Shape : The shape of various glyphs, like i, l, 0, etc.
  • Spacing : How wide some specific characters are.
    • Default: The default variant with ligatures and semantic full-width glyphs.
    • Terminal: Exact monospaced font without ligatures and full-width glyphs. Since some environments cannot interpret Iosevka as monospaced, and have difficulties with ligatures included, you can use Iosevka Term as an alternative.
    • Typesetting: Similar to Default, but more mathematical symbols are wider.
    • CC: Some of the symbols are en-widen to maintain compatibility with CJK typefaces. Ligatures are included.
  • Slab : Whether the font is slab-serif.
  • Ligatures : Whether the ligatures is included. The “no-ligature” variants are used for some Linux-based environments cannot handle ligatures correctly.
  • Family Name : The family name of the font in your OS after installation. If two variants share the same family name, they cannot be installed together.

Standard Styles

Download Option Shape Spacing Slab Ligatures Family Name
01-iosevka-#.#.# Default Default No Yes Iosevka
02-iosevka-term-#.#.# Default Terminal No No Iosevka Term
03-iosevka-type-#.#.# Default Typesetting No Yes Iosevka Type
04-iosevka-cc-#.#.# Default CC No Yes IosevkaCC
05-iosevka-slab-#.#.# Default Default Yes Yes Iosevka Slab
06-iosevka-term-slab-#.#.# Default Terminal Yes No Iosevka Term Slab
07-iosevka-type-slab-#.#.# Default Typesetting Yes Yes Iosevka Type Slab
08-iosevka-cc-slab-#.#.# Default CC Yes Yes IosevkaCC Slab

The bundled TTC packages contain combined files for 01-08 series, with less footprint. They are preferred for the Windows and Mac platform if you want to install the full Iosevka series.

Pre-built Variant Styles

For predefined styles varying from ss01 to ss11, there are pre-built stylized families provided in the download. A terminal version is also provided.

Download Option Shape Spacing Slab Ligatures Family Name
iosevka-ss01-#.#.# Andale Mono Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS01
iosevka-ss02-#.#.# Anonymous Pro Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS02
iosevka-ss03-#.#.# Consolas Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS03
iosevka-ss04-#.#.# Menlo Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS04
iosevka-ss05-#.#.# Fira Mono Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS05
iosevka-ss06-#.#.# Liberation Mono Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS06
iosevka-ss07-#.#.# Monaco Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS07
iosevka-ss08-#.#.# Pragmata Pro Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS08
iosevka-ss09-#.#.# Source Code Pro Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS09
iosevka-ss10-#.#.# Envy Code R Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS10
iosevka-ss11-#.#.# X Windows Fixed Style Default No Yes Iosevka SS11
iosevka-term-ss01-#.#.# Andale Mono Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS01
iosevka-term-ss02-#.#.# Anonymous Pro Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS02
iosevka-term-ss03-#.#.# Consolas Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS03
iosevka-term-ss04-#.#.# Menlo Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS04
iosevka-term-ss05-#.#.# Fira Mono Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS05
iosevka-term-ss06-#.#.# Liberation Mono Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS06
iosevka-term-ss07-#.#.# Monaco Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS07
iosevka-term-ss08-#.#.# Pragmata Pro Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS08
iosevka-term-ss09-#.#.# Source Code Pro Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS09
iosevka-term-ss10-#.#.# Envy Code R Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS10
iosevka-term-ss11-#.#.# X Windows Fixed Style Terminal No No Iosevka Term SS11

Experimental series

The following series are provided as experimental build.

Series Description
experimental-iosevka-aile-#.#.# “Iosevka Aile” quasi-proportional family.
experimental-iosevka-etoile-#.#.# “Iosevka Etoile” quasi-proportional slab-serif family.
experimental-iosevka-extended-#.#.# “Iosevka Extended” monospace series – wider than regular Iosevka.
